[category]
matching
[prompt]
In Alice's Wonderland, secret processing rules are used on text.

x: not matched anywhere
y: matched but wrong position

0 0000000 a
1 0000110 2
2 0010100 2
3 1110101 5
4 1001110 4
5 0101110 4
6 1110001 4
7 1001101 4

01 10 1010011 4
12 21 1100001 3
23 32 0111011 5
34 43 1100000 2
45 54 1011111 6
56 65 0111100 4
67 76 0001100 2
70 07 0000110 2 match 1
